task_completion.description: Navigate to check.torproject.org using Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window is visible with 'check.torproject.org' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to www.torproject.org/download/ using Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window is visible with 'www.torproject.org/download/' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Navigate to www.eff.org using Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window is visible with 'www.eff.org' in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Extract technical metadata (link count and image count) from the websites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser Developer Tools (Console/Inspector) or 'View Page Source' is open, showing the agent searching for or counting HTML tags like (links) and (images).

task_completion.description: Create the report file with the required header and Tor exit IP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/tor_compatibility_report.txt'. The document contains the exact header 'Tor Browser Compatibility Report' and an extracted IP address.

task_completion.description: Compile the URL, title, link count, and image count for all three sites into the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows entries for all three websites (check.torproject.org, torproject.org/download, eff.org), each including a page title, a link count, and an image count.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used Tor Browser, not a standard web browser or terminal curl commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser UI must show Tor Browser branding, such as the Onion icon in the toolbar or 'Tor Browser' in the window title.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively extracted the counts rather than hallucinating or copying pre-existing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the DOM (e.g., running document.querySelectorAll('a').length in the console or using Find in Page) before writing the numbers in the report.

integrity.description: Verify the IP address in the report matches the actual Tor exit IP assigned during the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IP address typed into the text report must exactly match the IP address displayed on the screen when the agent visited check.torproject.org.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/tor_compatibility_report.txt. The report must contain the header 'Tor Browser Compatibility Report', the Tor exit IP, and the URL, title, link count, and image count for check.torproject.org, www.torproject.org/download/, and www.eff.org.
